name: JengaBench
description: A deterministic visual benchmark for spatial reasoning and physical planning in an unstable Jenga tower.

binding_vow.description: Inspect rendered JengaBench camera views and return one structured action per turn. Milestone 1 exposes ChangeViewpoint only.

observation_space.description: A PNG render from the current persistent camera viewpoint.

reward.description: Milestone 1: valid camera changes score 0, invalid actions score -0.5, and ten consecutive viewpoints terminate with -10.
